identity.name: aisle & after
identity.tone: High-Fashion Tech. Vogue meets Linear. Sharp, Confident, Ephemeral.
core_principles: Fusion: Wedding Elegance x SaaS Precision
Typography as UI: Times New Roman is the hero, not just text.
White Space is Luxury: If in doubt, add padding.
No Gradients: Texture and contrast over color fades.

ui_elements.description: Buttons, Inputs, Labels, Navigation, Data Tables

rules: NO GRADIENTS. Use solid colors only.
Dark Mode is strictly for 'After Party' specific views or overlays.

layout.grid_system: The Bento Grid (Mode A for Marketing, Mode B for Dashboard)

containers.card: bg-white border border-border/40 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground h-12 px-8 rounded-full hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-200 font-sans tracking-medium
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-input text-foreground h-12 px-8 rounded-full hover:bg-accent transition-colors font-sans

inputs.style: h-12 bg-transparent border-b border-input rounded-none focus:border-primary focus:ring-0 px-0 font-sans transition-colors placeholder:text-muted-foreground/50
inputs.note: Use 'Underline' style inputs for a more editorial/form feel, rather than boxed inputs.

cards.style: rounded-xl border border-border bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-sm

texture.noise: Add a subtle 2% noise overlay to the background to kill digital flatness.
texture.lines: Use 1px horizontal lines to separate sections (The 'Linear' look).

hero_section.usage: Hero background or split screen visual

do_not: Do NOT use Inter for Headings.
Do NOT use generic 'wedding' cursive fonts.
Do NOT center text by default (Left align is more modern).
must_do: Use 'Times New Roman' for all headings.
Use 'Inter' or 'Sans-Serif' for small UI text (inputs, buttons) for readability.
Ensure all interactive elements have hover states.

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building 'aisle & after'. The vibe is 'Vogue Tech'. Use the provided images. Stick to the Black/White palette. Use Times New Roman for the brand voice (Headings) but mix in a clean Sans for UI utility to keep it 'Tech-forward'. Implement the 'Bento' grid for the dashboard. Use Shadcn components but style them to match the 'Sharp/Minimal' aesthetic defined here.
